name: 熊刀（★） | 多普勒
descriptionEn: This tanto-style survival knife features a faceted blade and full tang, complete with impact pommel. No fuss, no moving parts - just a reliable blade that's ready to work. It has been painted with black and silver metallic paints using a marbleizing medium, then candy coated. Getting lost in its color can prove fatal
descriptionZh: 这把日式短刀风格的求生刀具拥有多面刀刃和带握点的全刀柄。没有任何多余的部分 - 一把时刻准备战斗的可靠武器。 这把武器使用黑色和银色的金属涂料画上的仿大理石纹进行了涂装，并且外表裹上了糖衣。 被其外表所迷惑后果会很严重
